title: Moonlight Theme | Mod menu for Fabric
description: This resource pack changes the textures of small elements of the 'Mod menu' mod interface. [no updates are planned, only transitions to newer versions]
body:
![art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8acb2cc14bb3c80b2ef8e881f56a9691a0455abf_0.webp)

# About the resource pack:

This resource pack changes the textures of small parts of the interface in the 'Mod menu'.

It is suitable for attentive users and fans of soft and light colors.

Need: Mod menu.


![visual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6aee8466f369eb403d6785f2077d555f6916c8ea_0.webp)

# Note:

Please do not install this resource pack together with other similar ones to avoid conflicts.
